title: struthiola tetralepis var. glabricaulis
intro: Struthiola tetralepis var. glabricaulis, also known as the hairy-leaved struthiola, is a plant species belonging to the family Thymelaeaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Struthiola tetralepis var. glabricaulis include wound healing, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies in Africa, particularly in South Africa where it is native.
